title: Place Selection UI Correction Record
issues_corrected: Select Birth Place mode did not expose a birth-place dropdown.
Reflection Method dropdown was occupying the location-selection role.
Panchang location dropdown needed to be governed by Select Location / Enter Coordinates radio mode.

implemented_logic.star_reflection_enter_birth_coordinates: shows birth latitude/longitude/timezone fields and hides birth-place dropdown
implemented_logic.panchang_enter_coordinates: shows latitude/longitude/timezone fields and hides location dropdown

reflection_method_handling: single locked reflection status/action retained; separate method dropdown deferred until multiple approved methods exist
note: Panchang Select Location uses the legacy AG64B target id panchang-place-select while retaining AG71D data attributes.
